_comment: Template for rules/market_snapshot.json. macro-analyst populates this each morning from live feeds, then scripts/evaluate_rules.py consumes it. Unknown fields should be omitted rather than guessed — evaluate_rules.py marks rules with missing inputs as 'indeterminate', not 'un-fired'. Replace this template with the real snapshot at rules/market_snapshot.json.
_rates_cds: --- Yahoo for RO10Y (ROGB proxy), CDS from WebSearch / Bloomberg terminal scrape ---
_commodities: --- Yahoo: BZ=F (Brent), TTF via ICE feed, reservoirs from Apele Romane ---
_political: --- WebSearch for fiscal leaks, elections, PNRR decisions, rating agencies ---
_index_geopolitical: --- FTSE/MSCI calendars are known; Ukraine escalation from WebSearch ---
